channel.title: Food Safety Practice AU — Blog
channel.description: Free Australian food safety study guides, exam tips and SITXFSA005 preparation.

item.title: 10 Priority Allergens in Australia (Exam Cheat Sheet)
item.description: All 10 declarable allergens in Australia: names, hidden sources, and common exam questions for SITXFSA005 food safety tests.

item.title: Cross Contamination Exam Tips for Food Handlers
item.description: Cross contamination explained for Australian food safety exams: direct, indirect, equipment, allergens, and common multiple-choice traps.

item.title: Food Safety Certificate Cost by State (2026)
item.description: Typical food safety certificate prices in NSW, VIC, QLD and all states: food handler vs FSS, online vs classroom. Informational guide only.

item.title: Does a Food Safety Certificate Expire? Renewal Rules
item.description: How long food safety certificates last in Australia: FSS 5-year renewal, food handler rules, and what to do when your certificate expires.

item.title: Food Safety Practice Test Before the Real Exam
item.description: Benefits of free food safety practice tests before your SITXFSA005 assessment: weak topics, timing, confidence, and how to use 650 questions effectively.

item.title: Food Safety Supervisor vs Food Handler | Food Safety AU
item.description: SITXFSA005 vs SITXFSA006 explained: who needs which certificate in Australia, Standard 3.2.2A changes, and how to prepare with free practice.

item.title: Food Safety Training: Aged Care, Childcare & Schools
item.description: Who needs food handler training under Standard 3.2.2A: aged care, childcare, schools and charities. December 2023 changes explained simply.

item.title: HACCP Basics for Food Handlers: Exam Guide | Food Safety AU
item.description: Simple HACCP guide for Australian food handlers: CCPs, hazard types, monitoring, and common SITXFSA005 exam questions explained.

item.title: Get a Food Safety Certificate Online (AU) | Food Safety AU
item.description: Step-by-step guide to getting your food safety certificate online in Australia: SITXFSA005, RTO requirements, and how to prepare with free practice.

item.title: How to Pass the Food Safety Test in 2026 | Food Safety AU
item.description: Step-by-step study plan to pass the SITXFSA005 food safety test in Australia: key temperatures, topic checklist and the score to aim for.

item.title: Is the Food Safety Test Hard? (Australia 2026)
item.description: Honest guide to how hard the SITXFSA005 food safety test is in Australia: question types, pass rates, and how to prepare with free practice.

item.title: Temperature Danger Zone in Australia: Full Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about the 5°C–60°C danger zone in Australia: hot hold, cold storage, 2-hour/4-hour rule, and exam tips.
